overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a vibrant futuristic city street. The character walks through a neon-lit commercial district with towering skyscrapers and palm trees, pauses to admire the vertical architecture, then continues through an open plaza toward an elevated underpass while observing the mega-structures above.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial boulevard with mega towers

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering cyberpunk skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking down the pedestrian street then stopping to look up at the mega towers and skybridges

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with glass and steel facade dominating the skyline
tall palm trees lining the pedestrian street
large digital advertisement screen on building facade
wide paved pedestrian street with striped patterns
reflective glass office tower with geometric architecture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic boulevard with towering cyberpunk architecture. The character walks forward along the palm-lined pedestrian street, then tilts the camera upward around 8 seconds to admire the massive skyscrapers, skybridges, and neon signage against the clear blue sky.

agents.ego_description: walking past street food stalls and advertisement pillars while observing the commercial surroundings

entered.detail: wooden food kiosk with menu boards and serving counter
tall pillar with multiple digital advertisements including a burger promotion
small yellow vendor booth with graffiti art on the side

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to ground level and continues walking forward through a commercial district. The character passes food vendor stalls on the right and advertisement pillars in the center, with the mega tower still visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with park benches

events.description: entering open plaza area with increased greenery and park furniture

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the elevated walkway and underpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza in the distance

entered.detail: wooden picnic tables and benches arranged along the walkway
concrete ramp leading up to an underpass beneath the highway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open pedestrian plaza with park benches and increased palm tree vegetation. The character walks toward an underpass ramp while the elevated highway structure becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated underpass ramp with towering architecture

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the mega towers and elevated highway infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking up the ramp toward the underpass while looking up at the surrounding mega towers and elevated highways

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking up the ramp ahead of the player character

entered.detail: large purple billboard with 'Set Sail' advertisement

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character ascending the concrete ramp toward an underpass beneath the elevated highway. The camera tilts upward around 45 seconds to showcase the massive cyberpunk towers and complex elevated infrastructure above, with flying vehicles visible in the distant sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward progression through a vibrant cyberpunk boulevard that evolves from a neon-lit commercial street into a massive industrial underpass. It begins with a walk along a palm-lined pedestrian path, where the camera tilts upward to admire towering skyscrapers and skybridges against a clear blue sky. As the camera returns to ground level, the path leads through a commercial district filled with food vendor stalls and advertisement pillars while keeping a distant mega tower in view. The scene then opens into a wider pedestrian plaza with park benches and lush vegetation before turning toward a concrete ramp. Finally, the camera ascends the ramp beneath an elevated highway, tilting upward once more to reveal complex infrastructure and flying vehicles soaring between the distant towers.
